اقْرَأْ بِاسْمِ رَبِّكَ الَّذِي خَلَقَ
خَلَقَ الْإِنسَانَ مِنْ عَلَقٍ
اقْرَأْ وَرَبُّكَ الْأَكْرَمُ
الَّذِي عَلَّمَ بِالْقَلَمِ
عَلَّمَ الْإِنسَانَ مَا لَمْ يَعْلَمْ

"Read in the name of your Lord who created— Created man from a clot. Read, and your Lord is the Most Generous— Who taught by the pen— Taught man that which he knew not."Surah Al-'Alaq, 96:1–5

Established 1967

Naaz Book Depot

""|

A pioneering publishing company for over five decades, specializing in authentic Islamic literature and the Qur'an in multiple languages, serving the global Muslim community with dedication.

Latest Products

Check out our newest arrivals and best sellers.

A Legacy of Knowledge
Since 1967

Founded in the heart of Kolkata, Naaz Book Depot has been a beacon of Islamic knowledge for over five decades. Our journey began with a simple mission: to make authentic Islamic literature accessible to every seeker of knowledge.

“Our commitment remains steadfast: preserving authenticity while embracing the digital era to serve the global Ummah.”

Learn Our Story
Mohammad Irfan

Founder & Visionary

Stay Updated, Stay Enlightened

Be the first to know about new books, offers, and knowledge updates.

Naaz Book Depot

Publishing the Light of Knowledge since 1967. Specialized in authentic Islamic literature, Qur'an, and premium fragrances serving the global Muslim community.
